description: Reorder user-defined firewall policies for a specific source/destination zone pair.

local.ansible:
- name: Reorder User-Defined Firewall Policies
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/firewall/policies/ordering"
    method: PUT
    query:
      sourceFirewallZoneId: "{sourceFirewallZoneId}"
      destinationFirewallZoneId: "{destinationFirewallZoneId}"
    body:
      orderedFirewallPolicyIds:
        beforeSystemDefined:
          - string
        afterSystemDefined:
          - string
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.ansible:
- name: Reorder User-Defined Firewall Policies
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/firewall/policies/ordering"
    method: PUT
    query:
      sourceFirewallZoneId: "{sourceFirewallZoneId}"
      destinationFirewallZoneId: "{destinationFirewallZoneId}"
    body:
      orderedFirewallPolicyIds:
        beforeSystemDefined:
          - string
        afterSystemDefined:
          - string
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
